item.title: Archer v1.0.7
item.description:
v1.0.7

  • ai-workflow Skill Marketplace — second discover source: 168 skills across 6 workflow groups, local filtering, installs and update checks wired through the existing pipeline.
  • One-Click Worktree Tabs — branch side-button on agent rows in the + menu opens the agent in a fresh auto-named git worktree.
  • Usage Parser Protocol + Gemini — native collectors behind a UsageParser protocol; new parser for stock gemini-cli session shards.
  • Grok full integration — lifecycle + tool-call hooks, session resume, Ask Grok.
